title: Tesla beat Q2 delivery estimates and the stock fell. Wednesday’s earnings face the same problem.
summary: Tesla’s Q2 deliveries beat estimates but the stock fell. Rivian’s R2, now in production, targets the $45,000 to $60,000 SUV segment, the exact price band where Tesla’s Model 3 and Model Y generated over 96% of its 2025 sales.
